nasb.text: Behold, these will come from afar; And lo, these will come from the north and from the west, And these from the land of Sinim.”

esv.text: Behold, these shall come from afar, and behold, these from the north and from the west, and these from the land of Syene.”

cnv.text: 看哪！有些人從遠方而來； 看哪！有些從北方，從西方而來， 還有些從色尼姆地而來。”

ccb.text: 看啊，他们必从远方来， 有的来自北方，有的来自西方， 还有的来自希尼。”

csbs.text: 看哪！这些人从远方而来； 看哪！有些来自北方，有些来自西方， 还有些来自西尼姆地。”
